queries.question: Provide a list of all espresso machines and also provide a list of blenders in high-end residential apartment.
queries.sql:
SELECT Espresso_Machine.model
FROM Espresso_Machine JOIN Apartments ON Espresso_Machine.apartment_id = Apartments.id
UNION
SELECT Blender.model
FROM Blender JOIN Apartments ON Blender.apartment_id = Apartments.id
WHERE Apartments.name = "High-end Residential"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?espresso_machine a :Espresso_Machine .
    ?apartments a :Apartments .
    ?espresso_machine p:hasApartments ?apartments .
    ?espresso_machine p:model ?model .
    BIND(?model AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?blender a :Blender .
    ?apartments a :Apartments .
    ?blender p:hasApartments ?apartments .
    ?blender p:model ?model .
    ?apartments p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "High-end Residential")
    BIND(?model AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Which espresso machines are in high-end residential apartments and which blenders are located there?
queries.sql:
SELECT Espresso_Machine.model
FROM Espresso_Machine JOIN Apartments ON Espresso_Machine.apartment_id = Apartments.id
WHERE Apartments.name = "High-end Residential"
UNION
SELECT Blender.model
FROM Blender JOIN Apartments ON Blender.apartment_id = Apartments.id
WHERE Apartments.name = "High-end Residential"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?espresso_machine a :Espresso_Machine .
    ?apartments a :Apartments .
    ?espresso_machine p:hasApartments ?apartments .
    ?espresso_machine p:model ?model .
    ?apartments p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "High-end Residential")
    BIND(?model AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?blender a :Blender .
    ?apartments a :Apartments .
    ?blender p:hasApartments ?apartments .
    ?blender p:model ?model .
    ?apartments p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "High-end Residential")
    BIND(?model AS ?o0)
  }
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me all espresso machines and blenders in high-end residential apartments.
